enhancedCapabilities: README now introduces the APEX Chinese Community with a real anonymous homepage screenshot and explains the available content sections.
First-time users now have an exact visual path to sign in, open API Key management, copy the current Key, configure it with apexcn -apikey, and verify the account.
The guide explicitly warns that regenerating a Key revokes the previous Key and documents basic secret-handling precautions.
Release v0.80.4 includes both privacy-safe screenshot assets and an automated documentation consistency check.
unexpectedProblems: The first login-page screenshot inherited browser autofill and exposed an account identifier, so it was discarded instead of entering the repository.

The authenticated browser control session timed out while attempting an extra account-menu screenshot; the already verified API Key management page supplied the required end-state evidence without retrying any write action.
rootCauses: Authenticated community pages intentionally display account identity and Key material, so raw screenshots are not safe documentation assets.
The previous README assumed users already knew what the community was and where its API Key management entry lived.
preventionActions: Commit only anonymous or fully redacted community screenshots, inspect every final asset at original resolution, and never keep a draft that contains autofilled credentials.
Keep the API Key acquisition route in README and assert that every referenced onboarding screenshot remains present and non-empty.
Do not invoke the community Key regeneration action during documentation capture; verify its semantics from the owning server implementation instead.
nextMilestoneGoal: Keep roadmap milestone 0.8 active and its remaining Windows lifecycle, fresh independent novice validation, and seven-day readonly soak work paused until the user explicitly resumes it.
expectedResults: A new user can understand the community, obtain an API Key, configure apexcn-cli, and verify the account without guessing the web navigation path.
The latest GitHub Release resolves to v0.80.4 with seven checksum-verified assets.
No paused 0.8 acceptance gate is executed or represented as complete.
majorRisks: Community navigation labels or layout may change, making screenshots and step text stale even though the CLI remains compatible.
Using apexcn -apikey places the argument in shell history and may briefly expose it in the process list; the environment-variable method remains the safer alternative.
Roadmap 0.8 core acceptance criteria remain pending because Windows lifecycle validation, independent validation, and the seven-day soak are still paused by the user.

instructions: Re-read current repository state before planning.
Create only a just-in-time plan for the active milestone.
Resume the existing milestone; do not activate a later milestone until its acceptance and completion review are closed.
